title: SPBR-BlockEmission
description:
SPBR Patches  
Add colored emission blocks texture.  
Just like PTGI!
body:
# SPBR BlockEmission Patch
This is a Patch Pack for [SPBR](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spbr)  
Add colored emission blocks texture.  
Just like PTGI!  
**This Pack is made under LabPBR standard**  
If you want to use this pack you need a LabPBR supported Shader.  
And should put it _above_ the SPBR Main Pack
![Three primary colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41e54b6bfe4bf04fa25ca66fd822b43b7fb4331a.jpeg)
_This Pack Can Be Use With Any Other Pack._
